description: CoLiDE-EV static vs mini-batch SGD (batch_size in {100, 50, 1}) across n_nodes in {20,40,60,80,100} and ER densities {2,3,4}, averaged over 5 seeds. Each metric stores mean, std, and the per-seed values list. JSON is rewritten after every fit so the file always reflects work completed so far. [UPDATE 2026-05-27] d=20 cells were re-fit with tuned lambda1: ER2→0.02, ER3→0.02, ER4→0.03 (vs default 0.05). See lambda_tuning_d20.json for the sweep that determined these values. These d=20 cells carry an extra "lambda1_tuned" field; all other cells use the default lambda1=0.05 from the static_kw/batch_kw configs. [UPDATE 2026-05-27 #2] d=40 cells also re-fit with tuned lambda1: ER2→0.03, ER3→0.02, ER4→0.02 (vs default 0.05). See lambda_tuning_d40.json.
